scripts.build: npm run server:build && tsc -b && vite build && node scripts/check-bundle-size.mjs
scripts.test: npx tsx --test tests/backend-storage.test.ts tests/backend-note-parser.test.ts tests/backend-note-source-cache.test.ts tests/backend-generation-cache.test.ts tests/backend-guards.test.ts tests/backend-reminders.test.ts tests/backend-services.test.ts tests/backend-fsrs.test.ts tests/backend-exam-plan.test.ts tests/backend-feature-toggles.test.ts tests/backend-learn-progress.test.ts tests/backend-rate-limit.test.ts tests/backend-restore.test.ts tests/backend-search-status.test.ts tests/backend-share-password.test.ts tests/backend-share-payload.test.ts tests/backend-spaces.test.ts
scripts.test:all: npm test && npm run test:frontend && npm run test:ui && npm run test:e2e && node --test --test-concurrency=1 --test-force-exit tests/integration-ai.test.mjs tests/integration-modes.test.mjs tests/integration-mcp.test.mjs
scripts.test:e2e: npm run server:build && node --test --test-force-exit tests/e2e-api.test.mjs tests/e2e-readonly.test.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:postgres: npm run server:build && DATABASE_DIALECT=postgres node --test --test-force-exit tests/e2e-api.test.mjs
scripts.test:integration: npm run server:build && node --test --test-concurrency=1 --test-force-exit tests/integration-ai.test.mjs tests/integration-modes.test.mjs tests/integration-mcp.test.mjs
